qualifiers.espnText: Lineups are announced and players are warming up.

events.description: 首发阵容公布，球员热身。

qualifiers.espnText: First Half begins.
Foul by Guillermo Martínez (Mexico).

events.description: 吉列尔莫·马丁内斯犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Mateo Chávez (Mexico).
Mateo Chávez (Mexico) wins a free kick on the left wing.

events.description: 弗拉基米尔·库法尔犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Vladimír Coufal (Czechia) header from the centre of the box is blocked. Assisted by David Doudera with a cross.

events.description: 弗拉基米尔·库法尔射门被封堵。 大卫·杜德拉参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Denis Visinsky (Czechia) right footed shot from the centre of the box is close, but misses to the left.

events.description: 丹尼斯·维辛斯基射门偏出。

qualifiers.espnText: Denis Visinsky (Czechia) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Foul by Edson Álvarez (Mexico).

events.description: 埃德森·阿尔瓦雷斯犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Michal Sadílek (Czechia) left footed shot from the centre of the box is high and wide to the left.

events.description: 米夏尔·萨迪莱克射门偏出。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Denis Visinsky (Czechia) right footed shot from outside the box misses to the right. Assisted by Adam Hlozek with a headed pass.

events.description: 丹尼斯·维辛斯基射门偏出。 亚当·赫洛热克参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Handball by Luis Romo (Mexico).
Foul by Adam Hlozek (Czechia).
Foul by Robin Hranác (Czechia).
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Lukás Cerv (Czechia) wins a free kick in the defensive half.

events.description: 吉列尔莫·马丁内斯犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Denis Visinsky (Czechia) right footed shot from the centre of the box is blocked. Assisted by Adam Hlozek.

events.description: 丹尼斯·维辛斯基射门被封堵。 亚当·赫洛热克参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Lukás Cerv (Czechia).
Attempt missed. Israel Reyes (Mexico) right footed shot from the centre of the box misses to the left following a set piece situation.

events.description: 伊斯列尔·雷耶斯射门偏出。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Gilberto Mora (Mexico) left footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Jorge Sánchez.

events.description: 吉尔伯托·莫拉射门被封堵。 豪尔赫·桑切斯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt saved. Jorge Sánchez (Mexico) right footed shot from the right side of the box is saved in the top right corner by Matej Kovár (Czechia). Assisted by Roberto Alvarado.

events.description: 豪尔赫·桑切斯射正。 阿尔瓦拉多参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Roberto Alvarado (Mexico) left footed shot from the right side of the box is high and wide to the left. Assisted by Gilberto Mora.

events.description: 阿尔瓦拉多射门偏出。 吉尔伯托·莫拉参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by César Montes (Mexico).
Foul by Guillermo Martínez (Mexico).

events.description: 吉列尔莫·马丁内斯犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. David Doudera (Czechia) right footed shot from outside the box is high and wide to the right following a set piece situation.
Delay in match because of an injury Michal Sadílek (Czechia).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Attempt missed. Julián Quiñones (Mexico) right footed shot from long range on the left is just a bit too high. Assisted by Mateo Chávez.

events.description: 基尼奥内斯射门偏出。 马特奥·查韦斯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Julián Quiñones (Mexico) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Fourth official has announced 4 minutes of added time.

events.description: 第四官员示意补时4分钟。

qualifiers.espnText: First Half ends, Czechia 0, Mexico 0.
Second Half begins Czechia 0, Mexico 0.
Attempt saved. Lukás Cerv (Czechia) left footed shot from the centre of the box is saved in the top centre of the goal by Raúl Rangel (Mexico).
Delay in match because of an injury Tomás Holes (Czechia).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Attempt blocked. Julián Quiñones (Mexico) right footed shot from the centre of the box is blocked. Assisted by Gilberto Mora.

events.description: 基尼奥内斯射门被封堵。 吉尔伯托·莫拉参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Offside, Czechia. Pavel Sulc is caught offside.
